message:
lint(widgets): add descriptive reason to must_use on ErrorBoundaryState::error()

Change bare #[must_use] to #[must_use = "use the returned error for diagnostics"]
to satisfy clippy's must_use_candidate lint with an actionable message, consistent
with the recent must_use sweep in bd-fcl98.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
